commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds stale `.deleted.*` and `.reset.*` archive pruning to session cleanup, including a pre-update artifact sweep and integration coverage.

PR surface: Source +37, Tests +46. Total +83 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. From source inspection, a setup with `pruneAfter: 7d` and `resetArchiveRetention: 30d` would send a 10-day-old `.reset.*` archive through the PR’s new single-cutoff expiry path and remove it early.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can preserve the contributor’s branch while fixing the reset retention predicate/API and adding focused coverage.

target.title: fix: prune stale session cleanup archives
target.author: leno23

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
